mapper.update:
TRUNCATE TABLE bm25_doc_freq;
INSERT INTO bm25_doc_freq (term, doc_count, update_time) SELECT term, COUNT(DISTINCT doc_id), NOW() FROM bm25_term_freq GROUP BY term
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO bm25_doc_freq (term, doc_count, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.term}, #{item.docCount}, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (term) DO UPDATE SET doc_count = EXCLUDED.doc_count, update_time = NOW()
